actionConfiguration.body:
Ticket {{this.params.ticketId || TicketsTable.updatedRow.TicketID || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.TicketID || TicketsTable.selectedRow.TicketID}} status changed to {{this.params.status || TicketsTable.updatedRow.Status || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.Status || TicketsTable.selectedRow.Status}}

Hello {{this.params.name || TicketsTable.updatedRow.Name || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.Name || TicketsTable.selectedRow.Name}},

Your ticket has been updated by the support team.

Ticket ID: {{this.params.ticketId || TicketsTable.updatedRow.TicketID || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.TicketID || TicketsTable.selectedRow.TicketID}}

Subject: {{this.params.subject || TicketsTable.updatedRow.Subject || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.Subject || TicketsTable.selectedRow.Subject || "Not provided"}}

Status: {{this.params.status || TicketsTable.updatedRow.Status || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.Status || TicketsTable.selectedRow.Status}}

Priority: {{this.params.priority || TicketsTable.updatedRow.Priority || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.Priority || TicketsTable.selectedRow.Priority || "Not provided"}}

Admin Notes: {{this.params.adminNotes || TicketsTable.updatedRow.AdminNotes || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.AdminNotes || TicketsTable.selectedRow.AdminNotes || "No notes added"}}

Updated At: {{this.params.updatedAt || moment().format("YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss")}}

If you need to share more details, reply with your ticket ID.

send.subject: Ticket {{this.params.ticketId || TicketsTable.updatedRow.TicketID || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.TicketID || TicketsTable.selectedRow.TicketID}} status changed to {{this.params.status || TicketsTable.updatedRow.Status || TicketsTable.triggeredRow.Status || TicketsTable.selectedRow.Status}}
